repair_history.diagnosis:
line 210: Couldn't resolve reference to 'ACC_INPUT_PC1'.: Reference to connection ACC_INPUT_PC1 is not visible in the component type scope -> Replace ACC_INPUT_PC1 with accelero_thread.acc_in_data_x
line 210: Couldn't resolve reference to 'AHRS::Software::ATTITUDE'.: Package reference not allowed in AGREE expressions -> Remove AHRS::Software::ATTITUDE prefix
line 210: Couldn't resolve reference to 'IMPL'.: Implementation reference not allowed in AGREE expressions -> Remove .IMPL suffix
line 210: Couldn't resolve reference to 'acc_in_data_x'.: Reference to port acc_in_data_x is not visible in the component type scope -> Replace acc_in_data_x with accelero_thread.acc_in_data_x
line 211: Couldn't resolve reference to 'ACC_INPUT_PC2'.: Reference to connection ACC_INPUT_PC2 is not visible in the component type scope -> Replace ACC_INPUT_PC2 with accelero_thread.acc_in_data_y

/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 210: Couldn't resolve reference to 'acc_in_data_x'.: AGREE annex in ATTITUDE (component type) references subcomponent port accelero_thread.acc_in_data_x, which is not visible at component type level; only top-level ports and subcomponent names are visible, not subcomponent port accesses. -> Remove the entire annex block since subcomponent port references are invalid in component type contracts.
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 210: Couldn't resolve reference to 'accelero_thread'.: AGREE does not permit referencing subcomponent instance names (e.g., accelero_thread) in component type annexes; these are only visible in implementation annexes. -> Remove the entire annex block since subcomponent instance references are invalid in component type contracts.
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 210: named thing must be an expression with a type: The expression accelero_thread.acc_in_data_x is invalid because neither accelero_thread nor acc_in_data_x are resolvable identifiers in the component type context. -> Remove the entire annex block as it contains no valid AGREE expressions under component type scope.
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 213: Couldn't resolve reference to 'acc_in_data_y'.: Same as above: acc_in_data_y is a port of a subcomponent, not visible in component type annex. -> Remove the entire annex block as it contains no valid AGREE expressions under component type scope.

line 210: named thing must be an expression with a type: AGREE assumes/guarantees must reference valid identifiers or expressions -> Replace acc_in_data_x with accelero_thread.acc_in_data_x
line 211: named thing must be an expression with a type: AGREE assumes/guarantees must reference valid identifiers or expressions -> Replace acc_in_data_y with accelero_thread.acc_in_data_y
line 212: Couldn't resolve reference to 'acc_in_data_x': acc_in_data_x is not visible in the component type scope -> Replace acc_in_data_x with accelero_thread.acc_in_data_x
line 212: Couldn't resolve reference to 'attitude_calculation_thread': attitude_calculation_thread is not visible in the component type scope -> Replace attitude_calculation_thread.acc_in_data_x with ACC_SUBMIT_PC1
line 213: Couldn't resolve reference to 'acc_in_data_y': acc_in_data_y is not visible in the component type scope -> Replace acc_in_data_y with accelero_thread.acc_in_data_y

Couldn't resolve reference to 'acc_in_data_x'.: Reference to port 'acc_in_data_x' is not visible in the current AGREE annex scope -> Replace 'accelero_thread.acc_in_data_x' with 'ACC_INPUT_PC1'
Couldn't resolve reference to 'accelero_thread'.: Reference to subcomponent 'accelero_thread' is not visible in the current AGREE annex scope -> Remove 'accelero_thread.' prefix from 'acc_in_data_x' references
named thing must be an expression with a type: Invalid expression syntax in assumption/guarantee statement -> Use valid port references from the component's connection context
Couldn't resolve reference to 'acc_in_data_y'.: Reference to port 'acc_in_data_y' is not visible in the current AGREE annex scope -> Replace 'accelero_thread.acc_in_data_y' with 'ACC_INPUT_PC2'
